---
name: Security Report
about: Report a security concern without exposing sensitive details
title: "security: "
labels: security
assignees: ""
---

## Security Concern
Describe the issue at a high level.

Do not include passwords, API keys, tokens, private URLs, or exploit details in this public issue.

## Affected Area
- [ ] Authentication
- [ ] Authorization
- [ ] API
- [ ] Database
- [ ] Dependencies
- [ ] Environment variables
- [ ] Other

## Impact
Describe the possible impact.

## Suggested Fix
Suggest a fix if known.

## Notes
For serious vulnerabilities, contact the maintainer privately instead of posting details here.
